---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Capecitabine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Capecitabine</strong> 目前有 <strong>19 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Capecitabine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Xeloda is indicated for the adjuvant treatment of patients following surgery of stage III (Dukes' stage C) colon cancer. Xeloda is indicated for the treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer. Xeloda...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>diffuse gastric adenocarcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>gastric cancer（100.0%）</li>
<li>gastric carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>gastric adenocarcinoma and proximal polyposis of the stomach（99.9%）</li>
<li>microinvasive gastric cancer（99.9%）</li>
<li>gastric tubular adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>signet ring cell gastric adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>gastric cardia adenocarcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>carcinoma of stomach, salivary gland type（99.9%）</li>
<li>gastric pylorus carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>gastric body carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>Epstein-Barr virus-associated gastric carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>malignant gastric granular cell tumor（99.9%）</li>
<li>carcinoma in situ of gastric body（99.9%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of stomach（99.9%）</li>
<li>cardia cancer（99.9%）</li>
<li>carcinoma in situ of gastric cardia（99.9%）</li>
<li>gastric lymphoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>pylorus cancer（99.9%）</li>
<li>pyloric antrum cancer（99.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/capecitabine/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
